eyebrow.zh: 零配置 · 离线 · 确定性

headline.zh:
给 agent 留下的 AI 代码债
打一个确定的分数
headline.en:
Score the AI slop
your agents left behind

sub.zh: 五个纯 AST 检测器把你的 JS/TS 仓库压成一个确定的 SlopScore(0–100)和按文件排序的热力图 —— 全程静态、离线、不调用任何大模型。
sub.en: Five pure AST detectors turn your JS/TS repo into one deterministic SlopScore (0–100) and a ranked per-file heatmap — fully static, offline, no LLM calls.

title.zh: 一个分数,精确到每个文件
title.en: One score, down to every file

body.zh: 五个纯函数检测器给出加权 slop 密度,归一化成 0–100 的 SlopScore,分 clean(<34)/moderate(34–66)/heavy(>66) 三档,再列出最脏文件的排序热力图。每条发现都带可读证据(如“4 层包装、单一调用者”),是可核对的分诊工具,不是黑盒结论。
body.en: Five pure-function detectors produce a weighted slop density, normalized into a 0–100 SlopScore banded clean (<34) / moderate (34–66) / heavy (>66), plus a ranked heatmap of the worst files. Every finding carries human-readable evidence (e.g. "4-deep wrapper, single caller") — a triage instrument you can verify, not a black-box verdict.

title.zh: 检测 agent 特有的模式,而非代码风格

body.zh: over_abstraction、generic_boilerplate、plausible_but_wrong、dead_parameter、copy_paste_clone —— 五类 agent 高产的模式:多层单调用者包装、复制粘贴脚手架、吞掉异常的空 catch、从没被读到的参数、被轻改过的近似重复块。这些都是过得了 ESLint、编译也没错,却要人来还的债。
body.en: over_abstraction, generic_boilerplate, plausible_but_wrong, dead_parameter and copy_paste_clone — five patterns agents over-produce: deep single-caller wrappers, copy-paste scaffolds, empty catches that swallow errors, parameters that are never read, and near-duplicate blocks that were lightly edited. Lint-clean slop that passes ESLint and compiles fine, but a human still has to untangle.

title.zh: 一行命令,在 PR 上设卡
title.en: Gate a PR in one line

body.zh: --fail-on <clean|moderate|heavy|0–100> 让 SlopScore 一超阈值就退出非零,一步卡住 PR,不需要服务、不需要账号。打包成 GitHub Action 后,把档位和最脏文件写进 job summary,并把每条发现作为行内注释落到 PR diff 的对应行上。
body.en: --fail-on <clean|moderate|heavy|0–100> exits non-zero the moment the SlopScore crosses your threshold, blocking a PR in one step — no service, no account. Packaged as a GitHub Action, it writes the band and worst files to the job summary and drops each finding as an inline annotation on the exact line of the PR diff.

title.zh: 零配置 · 离线 · 每次一致

body.zh: 一条 npx slopaudit . 就跑,不用装、不用配。全程纯静态启发式:不调用大模型、不联网、无遥测。同一个仓库每次跑分完全一致,两分钟内产出终端报告、自包含的 HTML 热力图和 SVG 徽章。
body.en: One command — npx slopaudit . — nothing to install or configure. Purely static heuristics: no LLM calls, no network, no telemetry. The same repo scores identically every run, producing a terminal report, a self-contained HTML heatmap and an SVG badge in under two minutes.

chips: › 自包含 HTML + SVG 徽章

headline.en: Measure it before you clean it

sub.zh: 免费、开源(Apache-2.0)、离线。个人与开源项目永久免费,一条命令即可拿到分数。
sub.en: Free, open source (Apache-2.0), offline. Free forever for individuals and OSS — one command to get your score.

tag.zh: 给 AI 生成代码打分的零配置 CLI
tag.en: The zero-config CLI that scores AI-generated code slop
